title: Blackground
description: Replaces the title screen panorama with a black screen.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

Blackground replaces the title screen panorama and the options menu that is accessible through the title screen, with a solid black screen.
